name: COUGAR OmnyX Mid-Tower ATX Computer Case - Black - Quad 160mm PWM Fans - Ambidextrous IO Module - Bracketless Vertical GPU Mounting - Compatible with Reverse Connector Motherboards - 2x USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C - 2x USB 3.0 Type-A (382WA30.0001)
shortName: COUGAR OmnyX Mid-Tower ATX Computer Case - Black - Quad 160mm PWM
description: A black mid-tower ATX case with quad 160mm PWM fans and vertical GPU mounting for high-end builders.
